steps.title: Parallel lines: equal slopes
steps.content: Line k is $y = 8x + 7$, so $m_k = 8$. Parallel lines share the same slope, so line j also has slope $8$.

steps.title: y-intercept is given directly
steps.content:
Line j passes through $(0, 15)$, which is already the y-intercept, so $b = 15$.
$$y = 8x + 15$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
